title: penstemon bleaklyi
intro: Penstemon bleaklyi, also known as the "Gunnison's beardtongue," is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) that is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Penstemon bleaklyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be infused in hot water to make a tea, or used as a tincture in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal syrup.
